general.title: Important Notice
general.content: SoulAI provides content for self-exploration, cultural entertainment, emotional awareness, and personal growth reference. It does not constitute medical, psychological, legal, financial, or other professional advice.

ai.title: AI Advisor Disclaimer
ai.content: AI advisors offer spiritual guidance and emotional support. They are not substitutes for professional mental health care. If you are in crisis, please contact local emergency services or a qualified professional immediately.

divination.title: Divination Disclaimer
divination.content: Divination tools (tarot, astrology, numerology) are for reflection and self-discovery only. They do not predict guaranteed outcomes. Use insights as guidance, not absolute truth.

healing.title: Healing Disclaimer
healing.content: Healing content supports emotional well-being and mindfulness. It is not a substitute for professional medical or psychological treatment. Consult healthcare providers for medical concerns.
